penalties.description: Task was not completed within the 300-second time limit. Only 4 of 6 rings were transferred to the purple pegs, and no return transfers were completed.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video clearly shows an incomplete peg transfer task. The trainee successfully transferred 4 yellow rings from the right side to purple pegs on the left side, but did not complete all 6 outbound transfers or begin the return phase. Frame 16 shows a system message indicating improper grasp technique. The final frame confirms task incompletion. Since the task was not completed within the maximum time limit, the total FLS score is zero.
